metadata.description: Claude Code plugins shipped from the github.com/xgodev/boost repository.

plugins.name: golang-boost
plugins.description: Component-aligned skill bundle for github.com/xgodev/boost — 56 skills, one per boost component, cross-referenced via REQUIRED BACKGROUND so Claude loads only what the current task needs. Covers every factory contrib, every wrapper, every bootstrap component, plus a maintainer guide. Pulls in samber/cc-skills-golang for general Go skills and xgodev/quality-gate for the pre-push comparative gate as dependencies.
